Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.627

Title: Authorizes the towns of Ellington and Charlotte in Chautauqua county to elect a single town justice to preside in the town courts of such towns
Summary: Authorizes the towns of Ellington and Charlotte in Chautauqua county to elect a single town justice to preside in the town courts of such towns.
ActClause: AN ACT to authorize the towns of Ellington and Charlotte in Chautauqua county to elect a single town justice to preside in the town courts of such towns
